CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Scott M. McLeod, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Cornelius G. Harris, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Keith Wilson*, individually and doing business as The Boardroom, or Club Funston, LLC., a California limited liability company, individually and doing business as Woody Zips.
Defaults were entered against defendants on November 4, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, January 28, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Cnelius G. Harris, and against the Defaulted Defendants Keith Wilson, individually and doing business as The Boardroom, and Club Funston, LLC., a California limited liability company, individually and doing business as Woody Zips as follows:

Damages/Principal - $146,646.94.
Interest - $3,307.67.
Attorney Fees - $21,350.00.
Costs - $707.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $172,011.61.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

*Defendant Keith Wilson was present with his attorney, Jacquelyn Lindsey, but they were not permitted to participate in today's proceedings.
